generated_exposure.exposure_text: As tensions rise, our allies are cutting defense budgets while global threats grow. We can't afford to fall behind. Investing in our military isn't just about strength - it's about ensuring our families' safety and maintaining peace through deterrence. The alternative? Risking unpreparedness in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurityFirst
